meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Advanced User Onboarding Guide for AI Student Portfolios
content.seo_description: Overcome project paralysis with this advanced guide. Learn to build high-converting user onboarding flows using Antigravity and Claude Code for your portfolio.
content.answer_block: Stop searching for project ideas and start building high-value user onboarding flows. By mastering interactive walkthroughs, state management, and personalized AI-driven guidance, you transform a generic app into a professional-grade SaaS product. This is the single most effective way to demonstrate engineering maturity and secure your first developer role.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the developer's greatest adversary. You have the technical skills, but the lack of a 'killer project' keeps you trapped in tutorial hell, spinning your wheels on to-do lists and weather apps. The industry doesn't need another clone; it needs engineers who understand the friction points that kill user retention before it even begins.

User onboarding is where engineering meets psychology. By building a sophisticated onboarding engine, you solve the 'no project' problem while simultaneously proving you can design for business outcomes. This isn't just about UI; it's about architecting a seamless path from cold traffic to power user. Let’s build something that actually matters.

steps.title: Architecting the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Define the user journey states before writing a single line of UI. Use a state machine to track progress through the onboarding funnel.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust state machine schema for a multi-step SaaS onboarding flow using XState, including event transitions for 'next', 'back', and 'skip'.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create a state machine file at src/state/onboardingMachine.ts based on the generated schema.'

steps.title: Implementing Contextual AI Guidance
steps.description: Integrate AI to provide personalized tips based on user input during the onboarding process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build an AI-powered helper component that analyzes user input in real-time and suggests the next logical action within the onboarding flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Integrate the AI helper component into the existing onboarding layout using the Anthropic SDK.'

steps.title: Designing Persistent Progress Tracking
steps.description: Ensure users can resume their onboarding if they refresh the page by persisting state to local storage or a backend database.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a persistence layer that serializes the onboarding state machine to localStorage and synchronizes it with a Supabase table on every transition.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Implement the persistence layer in src/hooks/useOnboardingPersistence.ts.'

steps.title: Building Dynamic Interactive Walkthroughs
steps.description: Create a non-intrusive, highlight-based walkthrough that directs user attention to key features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React-based highlight component that uses portals to mask the background and focus on specific UI elements during onboarding.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Create a HighlightProvider and use it to wrap the primary dashboard components.'

steps.title: Analytics and Funnel Optimization
steps.description: Instrument the onboarding flow to measure drop-off points, turning your project into a data-driven case study.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add telemetry hooks to the onboarding machine that log user progress events to a mock analytics service.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Add telemetry instrumentation to all state transition actions in the onboarding machine.'

pro_tips: Never force a user to complete an onboarding flow; always provide a 'skip' path to build immediate trust.
Use 'optimistic UI' updates for onboarding steps so the transition feels instantaneous, even if the backend is slow.
Instrument your analytics to track time-to-first-value (TTFV), not just completion rates; this is what employers actually look for.
Implement 'progressive disclosure'—only show advanced features after the user has successfully completed the basic onboarding setup.
Build your onboarding as a modular package so it can be reused across different projects in your portfolio.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, deploy it to Vercel and create a 60-second Loom video walking through the architecture. Share this on LinkedIn to demonstrate your process-oriented thinking to potential hiring managers.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to build a high-conversion onboarding system that solves real-world business problems. Stop building toy apps and start shipping production-grade features that get you hired. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
